title: GitLab Environment Tier Production Promotion Without Protected Pipeline
dataSources: `sourcetype=gitlab:pipeline` deployment events with environment and branch metadata
app: GitLab Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase 6848); GitLab audit optional (`gitlab:audit`)
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="gitlab:pipeline" environment=production OR environment_name=production OR deployment_tier=production
| eval protected_pipeline=if(match(lower(_raw),"protected") OR protected_environment="true" OR only_protected_branches="true",1,0)
| where protected_pipeline=0 AND status="success"
| table _time, project_path, user_name, ref, status, environment
| sort -_time
description: Production deploys should run only from protected branches and protected environments.
value: Reduces risk of unreviewed configuration reaching production GitOps targets.
implementation: Ensure deployment JSON includes environment tier; join to `gitlab:audit` for approval if available. Alert on any successful prod deploy missing protection flags.
visualization: Table (recent prod deploys), Pie chart (protected vs unprotected).
